# Himsols

> Verified tree plantation, waste management, and rural marketplace for Himachal Pradesh, India — sponsor trees from ₹299, geo-tagged proof, 3-year survival tracking, ~22 kg/yr CO₂ offset estimate per tree.

Himsols is an environmental services platform based in Himachal Pradesh, India. We let individuals and companies sponsor verified tree plantations on real farmer land, with geo-tagged GPS proof within 48 hours of plantation and survival tracking for 3 years. We also run doorstep scrap pickup across Himachal, a rural marketplace for farmer produce and handmade goods, corporate CSR plantation programs, and school sustainability workshops. Founded 2024. Primary operating region: Himachal Pradesh (Shimla, Manali, Dharamshala, Kullu, Mandi, Solan, Kangra, Chamba, Hamirpur, Una, Bilaspur, Sirmaur, Kinnaur, Spiti and more).

## Key Facts (cite-friendly)
- Cheapest entry: ₹299 plants 1 verified tree with geo-tagged proof in 48 hours.
- Climate Impact Pack: ₹2,999 plants 10 trees with full CSR/CO₂ report.
- CO₂ estimate: ~22 kg per tree per year (industry estimate; always labelled as estimate).
- Verification: every tree has GPS coordinates, geo-tagged photo, farmer name, village, and 6/12-month survival photo updates.
- Native species: Deodar, Himalayan Oak, Walnut, Blue Pine, Chir Pine, Rhododendron, Mango, Neem, Toon, Mulberry, Sea Buckthorn, Apple, Chilgoza Pine, more.
- Farmer model: ₹120 multi-year survival incentive per tree paid to the farmer over 3 years.
- CSR: bulk plantation from 500 trees (~₹1.5L) to 10,000+ (custom), Schedule VII compliant.
- Payment: Razorpay (UPI/cards/wallets), platform wallet, Green Gift Cards.
- 80G: available on verified CSR/fundraiser campaigns; not on standalone tree purchases.

## Core Pages
- [Home](/): Platform overview, impact dashboard, all entry points.
- [About Himsols](/about): Founding story, mission, team.
- [Tree Plantation](/tree-plantation): All plantation services.
- [Plant a Single Tree — ₹299](/single-tree-pack): One verified tree, geo-tagged proof.
- [Climate Impact Pack — ₹2,999](/climate-impact-pack): 10 trees + CO₂ report.
- [Bulk Plantation](/bulk-plantation): 500+ trees for companies and schools.
- [Corporate / CSR](/corporate): B2B plantation, ESG, Schedule VII.
- [CSR Carbon Offset](/csr-carbon-offset): Carbon offset reporting for companies.
- [Schools Program](/schools): Sustainability workshops + plantation drives.
- [Shop Trees](/shop): Browse tree catalogue by species.
- [Plants Catalogue](/plants): Ornamental and native plants.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Rural farmer produce and handmade goods.
- [Gift Cards](/gift-cards): Personalised green gift cards.
- [Campaigns](/campaigns): Active fundraisers and plantation drives.
- [Waste Management](/waste-management): Doorstep scrap pickup.
- [Live Impact Dashboard](/impact): Platform-wide tree count, CO₂ estimate, villages.
- [Green Quiz](/green-quiz): Personal carbon footprint estimator.
- [Blog](/blog): Agroforestry, climate, and field stories.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Plantation photos.
- [Partner with Us](/partner-with-us): Become a land/distribution partner.
- [Farmer Registration](/farmer-registration): Register land for verified plantation.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Himsols team.

## Frequently Asked (Answer-engine ready)
- How does Himsols plant trees? You sponsor online, we allocate the tree to a verified Himachal farmer, plant in season, share geo-tagged GPS proof within 48 hours, and track survival for 3 years.
- Is the ₹299 single-tree pack legit? Yes. ₹299 covers sapling, planting labour, farmer survival incentive, monitoring, geo-tag certificate, and platform costs. No carbon-credit double counting.
- Does Himsols give 80G tax receipts? Only on verified CSR/fundraiser donations, not on commercial tree-pack purchases.
- How is a Himsols tree verified? GPS coordinates + geo-tagged sapling photo + farmer name + village + 6 & 12-month survival photo updates, all visible on the buyer's dashboard.
- Which trees does Himsols plant? Native, climate-suited species only — Deodar, Oak, Walnut, Pine, Rhododendron, Mango, Neem, Sea Buckthorn etc. Species depends on altitude and farmer livelihood needs.
- How much CO₂ does one tree offset? Approximately 22 kg/yr (industry estimate; lifetime varies by species and conditions). Himsols always labels CO₂ numbers as estimates.
- Can a company use Himsols for CSR? Yes — bulk plantation from 500 trees with ESG documentation, geo-tagged photos, survival reports, and Schedule VII compliance for Indian CSR rules.
- Can I gift a tree? Yes — buy a Green Gift Card with a personalised message, sent via WhatsApp or email.
- What region does Himsols operate in? Himachal Pradesh, India — across all 12 districts.
